parameters.url: ={{ 'https://' + $('⚙️ Setup').first().json.SHOP + '.myshopify.com/admin/api/2024-10/orders.json?status=any&limit=250&created_at_min=' + encodeURIComponent($now.minus({ days: parseInt($('⚙️ Setup').first().json.WINBACK_TAGE) + 1 }).startOf('day').toISO()) + '&created_at_max=' + encodeURIComponent($now.minus({ days: parseInt($('⚙️ Setup').first().json.WINBACK_TAGE) }).startOf('day').toISO()) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-opus-4-8', max_tokens: 2000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.prompt }] }) }}
